description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single qa stage that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-build-images:alpine-bash-jq-curl-git for the build jobs and no services. Define a hidden .trigger-build-packages-dev template that runs the before_script commands: `git clone "https://${OMNIBUS_GITLAB_BUILDER_IMAGE_BOT_USERNAME}:${OMNIBUS_GITLAB_BUILDER_IMAGE_BOT_PASSWORD}@${DEV_OMNIBUS_GITLAB_PROJECT}"`, `cd omnibus-gitlab`, `git checkout -B ${DEV_OMNIBUS_GITLAB_BRANCH}`, `git merge master`, and `git push origin ${DEV_OMNIBUS_GITLAB_BRANCH} -o ci.skip`, then executes a curl POST to ${DEV_OMNIBUS_GITLAB_TRIGGER_URL} with token, ref, and builder image variables. Add a build-ce-packages job that extends this template, runs the same before_script and curl command, and is manual, allowed to fail, and only runs when $PIPELINE_TYPE matches the canonical feature‑branch or merge‑request regex. Add a build-ee-packages job that also extends the template but sets `TRIGGER_EXTRA_ARGS=--form variables[ee]=true` so the curl request includes the extra ee form field. Finally, create package-and-qa-ce and package-and-qa-ee jobs that extend a .package-and-qa template, each triggering the gitlab-org/build/omnibus-gitlab-mirror project on the master branch with a depend strategy, setting PIPELINE_TYPE to TRIGGERED_CE_PIPELINE or TRIGGERED_EE_PIPELINE (and ee=true for the EE job), allowing failure and requiring manual execution.
